title: Download the Project Initiation Document (PID) Template
summary: Learn how members of the Digital Project Manager community can download the ready‑made Project Initiation Document template, which includes sections for context, parameters, WBS, RACI, risks, and sign‑off.
content: Members of the Digital Project Manager community have access to a comprehensive PID template. After becoming a member, you can download the template containing pre‑filled sections for project context, parameters, specifics, work breakdown structure (WBS), RACI matrix, risk register, and sign‑off fields. The template can be customized to match your project methodology.
related_topics: Member benefits of Digital Project Manager community
can_answer: Where can I download a PID template?
How do I obtain a PID template as a Digital Project Manager member?
Is the PID template available for free?
warnings: The template may require adaptation to align with your organization’s project methodology.
limitations: Access to the template requires an active paid membership in the Digital Project Manager community.
